title: Smoke-Tahini Bliss
description: A quick-fix dish featuring nutty, gooey tahini with a hint of sweetness and smoke flavor, suitable for sugar-free diets.

ingredients.name: Coconut Oil or Melted Coconut Butter
Pepper, to taste
ingredients.notes: Freshly ground pepper can be added if desired

ingredients.name: Smoke Flavor (e.g., smoked paprika, liquid smoke)

instructions: Mix tahini with sugar-free sweetener in a small bowl.
Add apple cider vinegar and coconut oil/butter. Mix well until the mixture is creamy and homogeneous.
Season with freshly ground pepper to taste. Add more or less according to your preference for smokiness and spiciness.
Pour the tahini-honey mixture into a shallow dish or mold, allowing it to set slightly (about 10-15 minutes).
Once set, you can top it with additional smoke flavor if desired, such as extra smoked paprika or liquid smoke. Re-bake in an oven at 325°F for another 5-7 minutes.
Serve immediately and enjoy your quick-fix dessert.
